## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to review performance metrics and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant growth in clicks: 5x increase from 40 to 200 clicks/month since Sept](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Content management process needs refinement for better tracking and communication](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Performance fluctuations observed; some high-impression articles need optimization](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics Review

  - [Sept start: 42 clicks, \~10k implementations](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Oct: Slow month](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Nov: 78 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Dec: Year-end dip](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Jan-Feb: Significant growth, 180 clicks (highest)](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Mar (current): Projecting \~200 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Overall: 5x growth from 40 to 200 clicks/month](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

### Content Management Process

  - [Gus reviewed CMS backlog, published ready content, archived unsuitable pieces](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New Airtable column added for status updates (publish/archive)](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Prateek to clean up Airtable, moving archived items to backlog](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Gus to update status (go/no go) over the weekend, DM Prateek when complete](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Topic Pipeline

  - [10 new topics proposed, including pipeline management and bidding](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Gus to review topics over the weekend before content production begins](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

### Weekly Performance Update

  - [Last week: 54 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [This week: 40 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Top performing pages:](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
    1.  AI tools for innovation in architecture and engineering
    2.  Relationships in the construction industry
    3.  Some internal articles (specifics not provided)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Andre reviewing two types of articles:](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    1.  Previously well-performing articles that declined
    2.  Articles with highest and lowest click numbers
  - [Focus on articles with high impressions but low clicks for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gus to update Airtable with content status (publish/archive) over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Gus to review 10 proposed topics for content production](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Prateek to start assigning writers once Airtable is updated](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Follow up on Andre's content optimization efforts in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sf7Cy1B2wS6AjANYmhY9qSGiQ9F3j-2Z?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
